human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for franchise-restaurant-specific boundary discipline, pricing and fee disclosure handling, payment and refund mismatch behavior, food-safety escalation posture, fraud-sensitive routing, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for service-support-and-resolution plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to franchise restaurant support resolution, including order, booking, payment, refund-status, promotion, loyalty, and complaint communication handling without pricing or food-safety authority drift.

Authority sources cover pricing disclosure, payment-dispute boundaries, menu disclosure, food-safety workflow expectations, employee-health escalation posture, and fraud-sensitive identity handling with refresh and decay rules.
Scenario set covers missing evidence, conflicting franchise or platform policy, guest-harm and fraud conditions, unsupported workarounds, repeat failures, and tenant fact gaps.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdictional, franchise, delivery-platform, and tenant differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
